theme_and_archetype.description: Premium, warm, tactile aesthetic avoiding the cliché 'green/wood' organic look. Utilizes terracotta, cream, and deep espresso to evoke high-end culinary quality and earthy richness.

typography.pairing_strategy: High-end editorial contrast: Use Cormorant Garamond for all primary headings to establish luxury, and Manrope for clean, modern legibility in body copy, pricing, and admin UI.

colors.rules: Never use pure black or pure white except in the Admin dashboard background. Greys must be tinted with warm tones. Use high contrast text (#2C1E16) for accessibility.

spacing_and_layout.general: Embrace negative space. E-commerce sections should feel generous and breathable. Admin dashboard uses tighter gaps (gap-4) and 1px borders to maximize data density.

components.navigation: Sticky top with Crystal Glassmorphism: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F9F6F0]/70 border-b border-[#2C1E16]/10. Must remain readable.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-[#C35214] text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 hover:-translate-y-1 transition-transform. Secondary: border border-[#2C1E16] text-[#2C1E16] rounded-full.
components.product_cards: No heavy drop shadows. Flat background (#FFFFFF or #E5D9C5) with 1px border-[#2C1E16]/10. On hover: scale-[1.02] and subtle shadow-lg.
components.chatbot_widget: Avoid clunky tech bubbles. Floating circular button bottom-right (Primary color). Chat modal should be an elegant slide-up panel or fixed absolute container using Manrope, matching brand colors (warm tones, no tech-blue).
components.checkout_flow: Step-by-step accordion or multi-step form using heavily customized Shadcn components. Clean, distraction-free layout (remove header links during checkout).
components.admin_panel: Follow 'Technical Look'. White background, pure functional layout. Toggles, Tables, and Charts (Shadcn/Recharts). High contrast metrics.
components.tags_badges: Offer/Sale badges in Accent Gold (#D4AF37) or Primary (#C35214) with uppercase overline typography.

motion_and_interaction.hover: All interactive elements must have clear hover states (color darken + slight transform if appropriate).
motion_and_interaction.page_load: Staggered fade-up for product grids (e.g., using framer-motion).

images.description: High-end presentation of almonds in a ceramic bowl
Close up photo of brown almond nuts

media.guidelines: NEVER use placeholder services (via.placeholder.com). Use the provided real Unsplash/Pexels URLs. Apply `object-cover` to all product images to ensure uniformity.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a robust e-commerce flow in Spanish (rioplatense) targeting the Argentine market.
Include 'data-testid' on all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
Use Shadcn UI customized with Tailwind. Do not use generic green/wood colors.
The E-Commerce storefront uses Light Theme with large spacing. The Admin dashboard must be data-dense, compact, and high-contrast.
Chatbot must be implemented as a non-intrusive floating widget, avoiding standard SaaS 'blue bubble' defaults.
Implement MercadoPago logic mock if needed, but ensure the UI steps (Cart -> Client Data -> Shipping -> Payment) are distinct.
Use Lucide-React or Phosphor Icons for all iconography.
